task.title: Spread Control Room graph nodes by default
task.summary: Tune the Cytoscape Graph view so the default layout has larger minimum node spacing and auto-fits the visible graph slice for readability.

goal.outcome: The Graph view opens with a readable spread layout where the visible node slice is spaced apart and fit into the viewport.
acceptance: Default Cytoscape layout parameters use larger node spacing/repulsion than the initial prototype.
After layout, the graph auto-fits the visible node/edge slice with a consistent padding so all visible nodes are in view.
Zoom fit/reset controls use the same default fit behavior.
Minimum zoom allows the spread layout to fit in smaller viewports without clipping nodes.
Docs describe the default spread-and-fit readability behavior.
non_goals: No manual browser automation in this task.

summary: TASK-064 Spread Cytoscape graph nodes and fit default viewport

evidence: Smoke test now asserts GRAPH_FIT_PADDING, GRAPH_LAYOUT_SPACING, minZoom 0.05, nodeRepulsion wiring, and fitGraph use.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Tuned Cytoscape cose/circle/grid layout options for readable spacing.
Added shared fitGraph helper used by initial layout and viewport controls.
Updated docs for spread-and-fit default graph behavior.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Smoke test now asserts GRAPH_FIT_PADDING, GRAPH_LAYOUT_SPACING, minZoom 0.05, nodeRepulsion wiring, and fitGraph use.
code_change_evidence: Tuned Cytoscape cose/circle/grid layout options for readable spacing.
Added shared fitGraph helper used by initial layout and viewport controls.
Updated docs for spread-and-fit default graph behavior.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Default Cytoscape layout parameters use larger node spacing/repulsion than the initial prototype.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: CONTROL_ROOM_JS now defines GRAPH_LAYOUT_SPACING = 180 and GRAPH_NODE_REPULSION = 26000; cose layout uses those for componentSpacing, idealEdgeLength, and nodeRepulsion plus nodeOverlap 72 and numIter 1400.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: After layout, the graph auto-fits the visible node/edge slice with a consistent padding so all visible nodes are in view.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added GRAPH_FIT_PADDING = 72, fitGraph(cy), layoutstop fit, and ready/requestAnimationFrame fit for the visible Cytoscape elements.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Zoom fit/reset controls use the same default fit behavior.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: controlGraphViewport now calls fitGraph(state.cy) for fit and reset.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Minimum zoom allows the spread layout to fit in smaller viewports without clipping nodes.
Docs describe the default spread-and-fit readability behavior.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated product and system Control Room UI specs to require a spread layout and auto-fit visible graph slice.
npx tsc --noEmit and npm test passed.

closure_brief.user_intent: Make Graph view nodes more spread out by default, with a default zoom that shows all visible nodes for readability.
implemented_changes: Increased Cytoscape graph layout spacing and repulsion.
Lowered minimum zoom to permit larger layouts to fit.
Added consistent fit padding and fitGraph helper.
Fit the graph after layout and on next animation frame.
Updated fit/reset controls to use the same default fit behavior.
acceptance_evidence: Acceptance criteria mapped to code/tests/docs evidence.
remaining_risks: Manual browser review may reveal layout density-specific tuning needs.

risks: Actual perceived readability depends on browser viewport size and graph density; further visual tuning may be needed after review.
